webdev.subtitle: fast and affordable
webdev.intro: We build modern, responsive websites that help businesses establish a strong online presence. From single-page landing sites to multi-page corporate websites, we deliver quality solutions at competitive prices.

features.title: Custom-Built, No Templates
features.description: Every website is unique and tailored to your specific business needs.

features.title: Modern, Responsive Design
features.description: Websites that look great on all devices — from mobile phones to desktop computers.

features.title: Fast Turnaround
features.description: From concept to live website in no time, without unnecessary delays.

features.title: SEO Optimization
features.description: Built-in search engine optimization so your clients can find you easily.

features.title: Affordable Pricing
features.description: Transparent pricing with no hidden costs. You know exactly what you're getting.

features.title: Maintenance & Support
features.description: Ongoing support and updates after your website goes live.

pricing.title: Website Pricing
pricing.footnote: Website technical maintenance is charged annually (€100–300 depending on project size) and includes hosting, SSL certificate, regular system updates, and basic technical support. After the completion and delivery of the base project, additional requests for functional or design changes are billed at €40/hour. For more frequent content changes, additional maintenance can be arranged.

webdev.pricingTeaser: Website pricing depends on project requirements — size, number of pages, desired features, and delivery timeline. Every project is unique and we tailor our pricing accordingly.

web-po-mjeri.subtitle: no templates, no limitations
web-po-mjeri.intro: When we say 'custom-built', we mean it literally — every website we create is written from scratch. No WordPress themes, no drag-and-drop builders, no compromises in design or functionality.

sections.title: Why templates aren't enough
sections.body: Wix, WordPress, and similar tools offer quick setup but come with invisible limitations. Templates are designed to be generic — to fit everyone, but perfect for no one. The result? Slower sites, difficult customizations, and an online presence indistinguishable from your competition. Every change beyond the template's scope becomes a battle with someone else's code.

sections.title: What you get with custom development
bullets: Design that reflects your brand and values
Faster loading — no bloated code or unnecessary scripts
Easy to expand and add new pages over time
Better SEO rankings thanks to clean code
Full control over structure and content

sections.title: Our process
sections.body: Every project starts with a conversation about your goals and vision. Then we design, code, and test — until the result is exactly what you imagined. No ready-made solutions, no shortcuts — just a website that works exactly as it should.

cta.title: Let's talk about your project
cta.description: Share your vision with us and we'll build it from the ground up.

responzivan-dizajn.subtitle: perfect on every device
responzivan-dizajn.intro: More than 70% of website visits come from mobile devices. A site that doesn't work flawlessly on mobile doesn't just frustrate visitors — it loses them for good.

sections.title: What is responsive design?
sections.body: Responsive design means that a website automatically adapts to the screen size — whether viewed on a phone, tablet, or desktop. It's not just a 'scaled down version' of the same page, but a thoughtfully rearranged layout that gives the user the optimal experience on any device.

sections.title: Why it matters for your business
bullets: Google ranks mobile-optimized sites higher in search results
Users who land on a poor mobile version leave within seconds
One website for all devices — no parallel maintenance
Higher conversion rate — more inquiries and purchases

sections.title: Mobile-first approach
sections.body: Every website we build is designed mobile-first — we start with the smallest screen and scale up to desktop. This ensures the mobile experience is just as polished as on a large monitor.

cta.title: Your site on every device
cta.description: Let's build a website that looks and works great on all screens.

brza-izrada.subtitle: from idea to launch
brza-izrada.intro: We understand your business can't wait weeks. Our process is optimized for speed without sacrificing quality — from the first conversation to a live website in the shortest time possible.

sections.title: How we stay fast
sections.body: We have a streamlined process that allows efficient development without unnecessary delays. After the initial conversation and agreement, we start immediately. We work transparently — you always know what phase the project is in and what comes next.

sections.title: What we need from you
sections.body: To get started quickly, it helps to have your logo in digital format, preferred colors and style if you have them, and text and images for content. Don't worry if you're not sure — we guide you through the entire process and help with decisions.

cta.title: Let's start your project today
cta.description: The sooner we start, the sooner you're online.

seo-optimizacija.subtitle: be visible on Google, and ChatGPT too
seo-optimizacija.intro: A beautiful website isn't enough if no one can find it. SEO (Search Engine Optimization) is a set of techniques that improve your site's visibility in search engine results — without paid advertising.

sections.title: What is SEO and why does it matter?
sections.body: When someone searches for 'restaurant Split' or 'plumber Zagreb', Google shows the pages it considers most relevant. SEO is the work that gets your site to be one of them. Unlike paid advertising, SEO delivers long-term results — once you rank, traffic comes continuously without additional cost.

sections.title: What we include in every website
bullets: Optimized title tags and meta descriptions for every page
Structured data (Schema.org) for enhanced Google results
Fast page load times (speed is an SEO ranking factor)

sections.title: Local SEO
sections.body: For local businesses, local SEO is especially important — optimization for searches like 'hairdresser Rijeka' or 'café Zagreb city center'. We ensure your site is optimized for local queries and appears on Google Maps for relevant searches.

sections.title: SEO for AI search engines (GEO)
sections.body: Beyond Google, more and more users are asking ChatGPT, Claude, and similar AI tools for website and service recommendations directly. Optimization for AI search engines — known as GEO (Generative Engine Optimization) — is becoming just as important as traditional SEO. Structured data, clearly and authoritatively written content, and complete business information all increase the chances of your site being cited or recommended by AI tools — a new channel that most competitors are still ignoring.

cta.title: Rank higher on Google
cta.description: Let's build a website optimized for search engines from the ground up.

cijene.subtitle: transparent, no hidden costs
cijene.intro: Website pricing depends on project requirements — size, number of pages, desired features, and delivery timeline. Every project is unique, and we tailor pricing to each client's specific needs. Below are our standard packages — contact us for an exact quote.

cta.title: Request a Quote
cta.description: Describe what you need and we'll send you a tailored quote.

odrzavanje-i-podrska.subtitle: we're here after launch too
odrzavanje-i-podrska.intro: Building a website isn't the end — it's just the beginning. A website needs regular maintenance, content updates, and prompt responses to technical issues. We're here for you even after launch.

sections.title: What maintenance includes
bullets: Content updates — text, images, pricing, news
Technical support via email or phone

sections.title: Collaboration models
sections.body: We offer flexible collaboration models — from one-time interventions to long-term partnerships with a fixed monthly fee. Together we choose the model that fits your needs and budget.

sections.title: Why regular maintenance matters
sections.body: An outdated website, unavailable hosting, or a security vulnerability can seriously damage your business and online reputation. With regular maintenance, everything stays in perfect shape — you focus on your business, and we take care of your online presence.

cta.title: Let's stay in touch
cta.description: Let's work out a collaboration model that suits you best.

webdev.whyUsText: Unlike most agencies, we don't use WordPress or pre-made templates. Every website is developed as software — from scratch. That means no limits in design, structure, animations, or functionality. We can build exactly what the client envisions — without compromise.

ugostiteljstvo.subtitle: Attract more guests and increase bookings
ugostiteljstvo.intro: Your restaurant, café, or bar deserves an online presence that reflects the atmosphere and quality of your venue. A modern website isn't just a business card — it's a sales tool that works 24/7. Guests increasingly look up menus, opening hours, and reviews online before visiting — be there when they search.
bullets: Digital menu with food and drink photos
Gallery of your venue and ambiance
Opening hours, location and Google Maps integration
Contact form and direct reservation link

cta.title: Let's launch your website
cta.description: Tell us about your venue and let's work out the details.

apartmani.subtitle: More direct bookings, fewer commissions
apartmani.intro: Every booking through Booking.com or Airbnb costs you 15–20% in commission. Your own website lets you attract guests directly — and keep that money for yourself. With the right SEO optimization, guests can find you on Google and book without intermediaries.
bullets: Contact form and WhatsApp integration for quick inquiries
Google Maps and directions to your accommodation

cta.title: Reduce commissions, increase earnings
cta.description: Let's build a website that brings you direct bookings.

obrtnici.subtitle: New clients find you online — be there
obrtnici.intro: Most new clients today search for a plumber, electrician, carpenter, or painter on Google. Without a website, you're missing those inquiries. A simple, professional site with your services, contact details, and portfolio is enough to stand out from the competition.
bullets: Overview of the services you offer
SEO optimization for local searches (e.g. 'plumber Split')
Fast turnaround — live within a week

cta.title: Let's get you online
cta.description: A fast, affordable website tailored to your trade.

male-tvrtke.subtitle: Professional online presence without big costs
male-tvrtke.intro: For a small business, a website is the cheapest and most effective marketing tool available. Potential clients check your online profile before they call — a professional site builds trust and increases the chances they'll choose you.
bullets: SEO optimization for your industry and location
Blog or news section for regular updates

cta.title: Let's build your online identity
cta.description: Tell us about your business and what you want to achieve.

turizam.subtitle: Reach more travelers with an attractive online presence
turizam.intro: Tourists plan their trips online — and your agency or tourism offering needs to be visible where they search. A modern website with attractive photos, destination descriptions, and a clear call to action converts visitors into clients.

cta.title: Attract more travelers
cta.description: Let's build a website that showcases the beauty of your offer.

saloni.subtitle: Showcase your work and attract new clients
saloni.intro: Clients choose a salon based on photos of work, reviews, and location — and they look for all of this online. A website that showcases your services and portfolio in a professional way brings you new clients without expensive advertising.
bullets: Online contact or appointment inquiry form
Links to Instagram and social media

cta.title: Show your work to the world
cta.description: Let's build a site that reflects your style and attracts the right clients.

poliklinike.subtitle: Patients find you online — be there when they search
poliklinike.intro: Whether you run a private clinic, a specialist practice, or a general practice, patients increasingly search for medical services online. A professional website with your services, team, and contact details builds trust and makes it easy for patients to reach you.
bullets: Overview of medical services and specializations
Location, working hours, and Google Maps integration
SEO optimization for local medical searches

cta.title: Make it easy for patients to find you
cta.description: Let's build a professional website for your practice.

odvjetnicki-uredi.subtitle: Build trust and attract new clients online
odvjetnicki-uredi.intro: Clients looking for legal help want to know who they're working with before they call. A professional website that clearly presents your areas of practice, your team, and your approach gives potential clients the confidence to reach out.
bullets: Areas of law and legal services overview
SEO optimization for legal search queries

cta.title: Establish your online presence
cta.description: Let's create a website that reflects your expertise and professionalism.

kulturne-ustanove.subtitle: Connect your audience with your programs and events
kulturne-ustanove.intro: Museums, galleries, theatres, and cultural associations need an online presence that communicates their identity and keeps their audience informed. A well-designed website helps you promote events, share news, and engage visitors — all in one place.
bullets: About the institution, history, and mission
Social media integration and newsletter sign-up

cta.title: Bring your audience closer
cta.description: Let's build a website that reflects your cultural identity.

prijevoz.subtitle: More bookings, direct — without third-party commissions
prijevoz.intro: Whether you offer taxi services, car rentals, or boat rentals, clients want to quickly find your offer, pricing, and how to book. Your own website allows you to take direct bookings without paying commissions to third-party platforms, and improves your visibility in local searches.
bullets: Fleet presentation with photos and specifications
WhatsApp and phone integration for instant contact
SEO optimization for local transport searches

cta.title: Get more direct bookings
cta.description: Let's build a website that puts you in control of your reservations.

cta.title: Ready to build your website?
